name: Kotleti
instructions:
1. Mix the ground beef and pork with finely chopped onion, minced garlic, soaked and squeezed bread, egg, salt, and pepper.

2. Knead the mixture with your hands for 3-4 minutes until sticky and homogenous.

3. Cover and refrigerate for 20 minutes to firm up.

4. Shape into oval, slightly flattened patties about 2cm thick.

5. Coat each patty in breadcrumbs, covering evenly.

6. In a large pan, heat enough sunflower oil to cover the bottom. Fry the patties for 4-5 minutes per side until golden brown and cooked through.

7. Serve hot with mashed potatoes, buckwheat, or vegetables. Sour cream pairs perfectly on the side.
simpleInstructions:
1. Mix all patty ingredients together.

2. Knead and refrigerate for 20 minutes.

3. Shape into oval patties.

4. Coat in breadcrumbs.

5. Fry 4-5 minutes per side.

6. Serve with mashed potatoes or buckwheat.
